prompt:
Unique, collectible NFT character in bold cartoon style. 
Background: Crosswalk with glowing streetlights reflecting in puddles. 
Head: Rounded head with texture resembling ribbed fabric. 
Eyes: Bright eyes with star-shaped glow trails. 
Clothing: Multi-pocket chest rig over urban fit. 
Color: Faint silhouettes trail behind movements. 
Species: Alien. 
Only visible text: 'VERT'. 
Bold outlines, cel-shading, flat colors, no gradients, no photorealism.
